summary: Implemented opt-in live-provider smoke with isolated defaults
raw: Added tests/e2e/harness_live_provider.rs and wired it into tests/e2e/main.rs. The smoke skips unless JCODE_HARNESS_LIVE_PROVIDER_SMOKE is truthy, requires explicit provider/profile plus model when enabled, uses temporary JCODE_HOME, JCODE_RUNTIME_DIR, and cwd, removes JCODE_TEST_SESSION/JCODE_DEBUG_CONTROL, disables skills, and supports copying a reviewed config.toml via JCODE_HARNESS_LIVE_PROVIDER_CONFIG for provider_profile runs. Updated SKILLS_HARNESS docs, status, and release notes template.
followUp: Do not enable live smoke in default CI without reviewed credentials and quota.

Updated status and release template.
followUp: Keep --include-network outside default CI unless separately reviewed.

summary: lib-bins default run timed out under local supervision
raw: The local supervised run reached the 600s Jcode background-command timeout while cargo test --lib --bins -- --test-threads=1 was still running and output showed many tests passing. No individual test failure was observed in the captured tail, but the suite did not complete within the local supervision window.
followUp: Do not promote lib-bins as a mandatory release gate yet. Document measured local timeout and keep it as a future split/optimization issue before CI promotion.

summary: Decided not to promote lib-bins gate yet
raw: Measured `python3 scripts/test_ci_suites.py lib-bins` locally. The default serial command hit the 600s Jcode background supervision timeout while tests were still passing, with no individual failure observed in captured output. Decision: do not promote lib-bins to mandatory release/CI gate yet; document it as a future split/optimization issue. Documentation/context validation passed with `git diff --check`, grep evidence, JSON parsing, and scope check.
followUp: Use issues to split/optimize lib-bins before considering it mandatory. Continue with local-first issue triage.

Final validation: cargo fmt --check, focused e2e tests, cargo check -p jcode, and .codex-harness JSON parse all passed.
followUp: Record gate, commit governance, then continue issue-based local-first implementation.
